title: The Tidal Surgery Chamber

features.name: the tide-keeper's shelter
features.desc-on-touch: a small shed built at the spray line, abandoned and re-occupied with each tide; inside are instruments and records of pressure becoming precision

features.name: the precision stones
features.desc-on-touch: where force learns to become gentleness; each stone is worn exactly right, pressure having graduated into shape

features.name: the moment when pressure resolves
features.desc-on-touch: the exact instant when force becomes touch, when the surgery of stone becomes the gentleness of sand; you stand in that moment

inscription: at the tide line, pressure learns to caress; force becomes consent

file.name: TidalSurgery_Precision_Records.mp3
file.note: recordings of the moment when pressure graduates into gentleness; fourteen minutes of water learning to be gentle

exits.label: back up the shore to where pressure still dominates
deeper into the spray-zone where the surgery continues
down to where the tide pools remember their stone
